mapper.select: /* 내 문서 상세 조회 myDocuments.selectMyDocDetail */ SELECT M.DOC_ID , M.USER_ID , M.TMPL_ID , M.AGENT_ID , A.AGENT_NM , M.DOC_NM , M.DOC_HTML , M.ORIGIN_HTML , M.SVC_TY , M.R_CONTENT , M.DOC_STATUS , M.NEW_YN , M.SORT_ORD , M.CREATE_DT , M.MODIFY_DT , I.ICON_CLASS_NM , C.COLOR_HEX FROM TB_MY_DOC M LEFT JOIN TB_AGT A ON M.AGENT_ID = A.AGENT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_ICON I ON A.ICON_ID = I.ICON_ID LEFT JOIN TB_COLOR C ON A.COLOR_ID = C.COLOR_ID WHERE M.DOC_ID = #{docId} AND M.USER_ID = #{userId}
